lines.speaker: Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight
lines.text: This is Seers Village! We're an organisation of mystically gifted people with the power of foresight...we see things that have yet to come to pass.

lines.speaker: Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight
lines.text: A lot of our time is spent addressing everyday sorts of things, plus we meditate a lot and enhance our powers of mystical foresight.

lines.speaker: Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight
lines.text: Unfortunately no, sorry, but if adventure is what you seek, try checking through your quest list!

lines.speaker: Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight
lines.text: Thank you, all I need to do is figure out how to get these logs into that vial, but that's my problem. Take this as a reward.
